name: Short-Form Video Content Generator
description: Researches trending topics via Exa, uses Claude AI to generate engaging short-form video scripts with hooks and CTAs, and saves the content plan to Google Sheets with a summary posted to Slack. Adapted from n8n's YouTube Shorts automation tool.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for trending topic research

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving content plan

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the content plan

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the summary

niche.description: Content niche or topic area (e.g. 'tech tutorials', 'fitness tips', 'cooking hacks')

numberOfScripts.description: Number of short-form video scripts to generate (default: 5)

targetPlatform.description: Target platform: YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram Reels

steps.name: Build Exa search query for trending topics
Build Claude prompt for video script generation
Build Sheets rows from generated scripts
Build Slack summary of generated scripts
